title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic released the Mythos model family and Fable 5, with Fable 5 being Mythos 5 with guardrails. Fable 5 is available at no extra cost on Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which it will require usage credits.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of the Mythos model family alongside Fable 5, which is described as Mythos 5 with guardrails applied. It matters because Fable 5 is available at no extra cost on Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which access shifts to a usage-credit model. The key takeaway is the relationship between the two: Fable 5 is the guarded variant of Mythos 5, with the discussion touching on guardrails and model compression.
